message:
bd-ml2r.4.1: implement FNX edge criticality scoring for cycle removal

Add fnx_cycle_scorer module for ranking edge reversals by structural
criticality using FNX graph analysis:

- CriticalityScoringConfig: configurable weights for bridge/articulation/
  centrality penalties
- EdgeCriticalityScore: detailed score breakdown per edge
- compute_criticality_scores(): runs bridges(), articulation_points(),
  and degree_centrality() to score each edge
- edges_by_criticality_ascending(): deterministic ordering for cycle
  removal strategies

Higher scores indicate edges that should be preserved (not reversed):
- Bridge edges get highest penalty (removing disconnects graph)
- Articulation point endpoints add penalty
- High-centrality nodes add penalty

Includes 8 unit tests covering scoring behavior and determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
